title: Assault frigate (disambiguation)
content:
'''Assault frigate''' can refer to the following:

==Canon==
*The '''[[assault frigate]]''', a general type of [[frigate]] used by the [[New Republic]]
*The '''[[Assault Frigate Mark II]]''', a model of frigate used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Assault frigate/Legends|Assault frigate]]''', a class of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]
**The '''[[Assault Frigate Mark I]]''', a model of [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]
**The [[Assault Frigate Mark II/Legends|'''Assault Frigate Mark II''']], a model of frigate used by the Alliance to Restore the Republic

==Out-of-universe==
*The '''''[[Assault Frigate Mark II Expansion Pack]]''''', a [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] supplement to ''[[Star Wars: Armada]]''

{{Disambig}}

|nl=Rebel Assault Frigate
|es=Fragata de Asalto
